name: @atlas/api
description: Atlas backend — Hono API on Cloudflare Workers, Postgres (Supabase) via Drizzle. The intelligence layer behind apps/web.

scripts.seed:build: node seed/generate.mjs && node seed/glove/generate.mjs && node seed/glove/generate-metrics.mjs && node seed/edgar/generate.mjs && node seed/graph/generate.mjs && node seed/industry/generate.mjs
scripts.db:test: node seed/test-pg.mjs && node seed/test-migrate.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-presenters.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-fees.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-cors.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-quarters.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-ratios.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-scoring.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-statements.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-valuechain.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-pms.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-pms-db.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-industry.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-taxonomy.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-drivers.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-ingest.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types seed/test-sources.mjs
